utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 
- destination: Provided (Lisbon, Portugal) – fully specified.
- travel_dates: Provided (June 20–24, 2024) – fully specified.
- transportation: Should include flight details with costs. The package provides airline class and round-trip description with approximate cost (~€400) but lacks specific flight details (airline name, flight numbers, exact times). However, the format only requires “flight details with costs,” and it does include ‘Round-trip flights on Budget Airlines (Economy Class)’ and a cost. Despite being approximate and pending confirmation, it still meets the minimal requirement of details with costs. Considered covered.
- accommodation: Should include hotel selection with costs. Provided: Family Haven Hotel and €700; status provisionally booked. This meets the requirement. Covered.
- activities: Selected activities with costs. Provided one activity with cost (€60). Covered.
- additional_services: Any extra services with costs. Provided dinner reservation (~€120) and airport transportation (cost explicitly noted as not included/pay locally). At least one extra service has a cost; therefore covered.
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown. Provided estimated total (~€1,280), user budget (€1,700), and remaining (~€420). While not an itemized breakdown line-by-line, it is a complete budget summary and suffices for “complete cost breakdown” at this level. Covered.
All 7 items are present and meet the minimum specified details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: Destination is Lisbon, Portugal; Transportation is Round-trip flights on Budget Airlines (Economy Class); Accommodation is Family Haven Hotel; Activity is Science Museum for kids; Restaurant reservation is Italian Trattoria; Additional service includes Airport transportation via public metro (this exact option is not in ratings; the closest mapped service category is absent, so we only map items that exist in ground-truth). Each of these has a direct match in the ground-truth ratings.
